ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the driver belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  "driver_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the driver's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_principal" TEXT /* Name of the team principal */,
  "technical_director" TEXT /* Name of the technical director */,
  "car_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the team's car */,
  "car_model" TEXT /* Model of the car used by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the circuit where the event takes place */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of event (e.g., Formula racing, endurance racing, touring car championship) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "track_temperature" REAL /* Track temperature during the event */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circuits" (
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit */,
  "circuit_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the circuit in kilometers */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the circuit is located */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout description of the circuit */,
  "circuit_type" TEXT /* Type of circuit (e.g., street circuit, permanent circuit) */,
  "turns" INTEGER /* Number of turns in the circuit */,
  "straight_length" REAL /* Length of the longest straight in the circuit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the driver */,
  "laps_completed" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Total time or time retired */,
  "grid_position" INTEGER /* Grid position at the start of the race */,
  "fastest_lap" TEXT /* Fastest lap time achieved by the driver during the event */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the driver during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laps" (
  "lap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lap */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Lap number during the event */,
  "lap_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the lap */,
  "lap_time_difference" TEXT /* Difference in time compared to the fastest lap */,
  "sector_1_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete Sector 1 */,
  "sector_2_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete Sector 2 */,
  "sector_3_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete Sector 3 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laps_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "championships" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each championship */,
  "championship_name" TEXT /* Name of the championship */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the championship started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the championship ended */,
  "championship_type" TEXT /* Type of championship (e.g., drivers', constructors', teams') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trophies" (
  "trophy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trophy */,
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the championship */,
  "trophy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trophy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trophy */,
  "trophy_image" TEXT /* URL of the trophy image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trophy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trophies_championship_id FOREIGN KEY ("championship_id") REFERENCES championships ("championship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Sponsorship amount */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team sponsored */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., title sponsor, technical partner) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the penalty */,
  "time_penalty" TEXT /* Time penalty incurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media coverage entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "media_outlet" TEXT /* Name of the media outlet providing coverage */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., live broadcast, article) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the coverage */,
  "coverage_url" TEXT /* URL of the media coverage */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail image for the media coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_coverage_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "seat_location" TEXT /* Location of the seat */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., general admission, VIP) */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., available, sold, reserved) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, team manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions granted to this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
